span.p:
Articulable SUSPICION?
can you NAME a typology?

span.p:
Also crosses a value/cash
reporting threshold?

span.p:
SAR/STR only
narrative answers WHY
(typology, not transaction)

span.p:
Does the sub-threshold pattern look like
STRUCTURING to dodge the threshold?

span.p:
NO report
DOCUMENT the no-file rationale
(the decision is itself a record)
